integration_validation_v2.evidence: state_probe.rs:1690-1748 (record_screenshot_artifact_storage: validate_screenshot_artifact_storage + real PG upsert keyed to capture_id, retention ttl/pinned, in-tx SCREENSHOT_ARTIFACT_STORED event); migration 0115 wired at mod.rs:2107. CONCERN: atelier_diagnostics_projections_tests.rs:185-294 proves real stealth-window+capture base, metadata round-trip, idempotent re-store, machine-local manifest-id rejection -- but no count_events_for_aggregate on SCREENSHOT_ARTIFACT_STORED; EventLedger proof half missing

integration_validation_v3.evidence: V2 gap was no count assert on SCREENSHOT_ARTIFACT_STORED. atelier_diagnostics_projections_tests.rs:233-395 mt153 now asserts ==1 after store, ==2 after idempotent re-store/pin, ==0 for rejected machine-local manifest-id write, on the real stealth-window+capture base with full metadata/retention round-trip re-read.
integration_validation_v3.basis: v3 adversarial per-MT review of remediated deliverable + runtime proof via full-crate managed-PG sweep and kernel-builder fresh-DB proof logs

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.
